description: MACF agent hooks: auto-pickup context injection (SessionStart) + cross-agent peer notification (Stop). v0.2.0+ removes the dependency-installer + adjacency-symlink hook (replaced by npx dispatch per DR-022). v0.2.1 adds the type:'mcp_tool' Stop hook invoking notify_peer per DR-023 UC-1 (groundnuty/macf#256).
